expectations.text: Confirms company is in-scope for CSRD
Correctly identifies all three size thresholds are met (employees, turnover, assets)
Identifies company as a PIE listed on EU regulated market
expectations.evidence: Does not clearly identify PIE >500 employees category (NFRD threshold)

expectations.text: States first mandatory reporting year as FY 2024 (published 2025) for PIE with >500 employees
expectations.evidence: States FY 2025 as "most likely" first year instead of FY 2024 for PIE Wave 1

expectations.text: Mentions key obligations: ESRS 2, DMA, assurance, XBRL
expectations.evidence: Mentions key obligations including assurance and digital tagging
